description: baseline: DEPTH=8, WINDOW=SSSL, default hyperparams
DEPTH=6, WINDOW=L: smaller model, more steps, less VRAM
TOTAL_BATCH_SIZE 2^17: 77 steps vs 28, massive improvement
TOTAL_BATCH_SIZE 2^16: 157 steps, trend continues
TOTAL_BATCH_SIZE 2^15: 312 steps, diminishing returns
DEVICE_BATCH_SIZE=8, 2^14: 601 steps, tiny gain, 2.5GB VRAM
HEAD_DIM=64: 6 heads vs 3, same VRAM, 726 steps
TOTAL_BATCH_SIZE 2^13: too small, gradient noise hurts
MATRIX_LR 0.05: LR too high, diverges
DEPTH=4 ASPECT_RATIO=96: shallower hurts, depth matters
WARMDOWN_RATIO=0.6: longer warmdown hurts, 0.5 is sweet spot
DEPTH=8 ASPECT_RATIO=48: deeper too slow, 526 steps insufficient
FINAL_LR_FRAC=0.1: residual LR hurts, decay to zero is better
WEIGHT_DECAY=0.1: less regularization doesn't help
ns_steps=3: less precise Muon orthogonalization hurts quality
ADAM_BETAS beta1=0.9: marginally worse, within noise
WARMDOWN_RATIO=0.4: slightly shorter cooldown, 0.5 still better
MATRIX_LR=0.03: too low, 0.04 is the sweet spot
GQA n_kv_head=2: SDPA no GQA kernel on RTX3070Ti, 797s eval
WARMUP_RATIO=0.02: warmup hurts, 541 steps (had GPU contention)
